title: [Feature]: option to export wizard config as YAML for version control
body:
I love the browser wizard for prototyping, but for a project I want to commit alongside the rest of my repo, I'd love an 'export to YAML' button so I can check the config into git. Right now I copy the device config out by hand and the wizard layout doesn't roundtrip — so my git-tracked config drifts from what the wizard would have produced.

Use case: small embedded shop with a handful of esphome.cloud projects; we want each project's wizard config to be reviewable in PRs. Would happily try a prototype build if you wanted alpha testers.
_notes: Clearly in-scope feature request (wizard YAML export). Reply acknowledges, sets office-hours expectation.
